HGSS.602.0000:
You!
How is your Pokémon training\r
coming along?\f
Have you ever noticed that in the
mountains, sometimes there are round\r
boulders right in your way...?\f
You can move them with the
hidden move Strength!\f
Hikers at Mt. Mortar sometimes have
extra, or so I’ve heard...
HGSS.602.0001:
Gobble...gobble...\f
...Choke!
Ack... I’m choking!\f
Whew! That was close.
I should chew before I swallow my food.
HGSS.602.0002:
Whenever I roll into Olivine, I always
visit the Olivine Café.\f
Everything on the menu makes me feel
stronger. I can’t stop eating!
HGSS.602.0003:
Olivine Café’s menu is chock-full
of hearty fare for beefy Sailors!
HGSS.602.0004:
Jasmine: Hi!
...!\f
These empty dishes in front of me
are not all mine...\f
Er...\f
Actually, the person who sat here
ahead of me ate a lot...\f
Anyway, do you want to exchange
phone numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.602.0006:
Jasmine: Now we can contact each
other anytime.\f
I should be able to battle you around
noon on Wednesdays.\r
I’ll be waiting for your call!
HGSS.602.0008:
Jasmine: Did you change your mind?
Will you exchange numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.602.0009:
Jasmine: We seem to...bump into each
other often.\f
Why don’t we take a picture
to make this a memory? [0200,0000]
HGSS.602.0011:
Jasmine: You did a fine job.
We look good.
HGSS.602.0013:
Your Photo Album is full.\f
Access your PC to delete
some pictures.
